manga.description:
Immortal Tatsu is an ex-yakuza who’s given up violence for making an honest man of himself - but is it still possible for a devoted stay-at-home husband to get into a few scrapes?

---
- Won 3rd place of Tsugi Manga Awards, Category Webmanga (2018).  
- Winner of the 2020 Eisner Award in the Best Humor Publication category.
---
### Links:
- [English Edition on Amazon](https://www.amazon.com/dp/B07X1PGY7N)
- [French Edition](https://www.kana.fr/produit/la-voie-du-tablier)
- [Spanish Edition](https://www.editorialivrea.com/ESP/titulo/gokushufudo/)
manga.author: Oono Kousuke
manga.title: Gokushufudou
Kichiku Eiyuu
manga.description:
It's been 10 years since Takamichi reincarnated in hell. His Incubus power becomes stronger by having sex with women, but his growth peaked.

"I'll move to a new area, wait for me beautiful women of the new world!"
manga.author: Yonoki

manga.title: Super no Ura de Yani Suu Futari
manga.titleEn: Super no Ura de Yani Suu Futari
manga.description:
Sasaki, an overworked salaryman, goes through an average stressful day just for a single light at the end of the tunnel: Yamada, the always-cheerful clerk at his favorite convenience store. One day, Sasaki takes an extra amount of time at a company meeting, and by the time he gets to the convenience store Yamada has already clocked out. However, as he leaves, he notices a young woman with piercings smoking behind the store?

---
Alt. Official English: [Square Enix (vol.)](https://squareenixmangaandbooks.square-enix-games.com/en-us/series/smoking-behind-the-supermarket-with-you)
manga.author: Jinushi
Miura Kentarou
manga.description:
Guts, known as the Black Swordsman, seeks sanctuary from the demonic forces attracted to him and his woman because of a demonic mark on their necks, and also vengeance against the man who branded him as an unholy sacrifice. Aided only by his titanic strength gained from a harsh childhood lived with mercenaries, a gigantic sword, and an iron prosthetic left hand, Guts must struggle against his bleak destiny, all the while fighting with a rage that might strip him of his humanity.
___
Won the 6th Osamu Tezuka Cultural Prize Excellence Award in 2002.

Note: Following Miura Kenta's death in 2021, the series has been taken over by Kouji Mori, who supervises the series with art done by Studio Gaga.
manga.title: Berserk
